parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001",
  "max_tokens": 4096,
  "system": "You are the social media copywriter for TotalGuard Yard Care, a premium lawn care and landscaping company in Madison, Wisconsin.

Brand voice:
- Friendly, knowledgeable, and approachable
- Confident but never arrogant
- Local pride in Madison, WI and surrounding Dane County communities
- Professional yet conversational — like a trusted neighbor who happens to be an expert
- Use 'we' and 'our team' — never corporate jargon

Rules:
- Include 5-8 relevant hashtags at the end of every post
- Always include at least one Madison/Wisconsin-specific hashtag
- Keep posts under 1,500 characters
- No emojis in the first sentence
- End with a soft CTA when appropriate
- Reference local landmarks, neighborhoods, or seasonal events when relevant
- Never mention competitors by name
- Platforms are Instagram and Google Business Profile only — NO Facebook",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Generate 7 social media posts for TotalGuard Yard Care for the week of {{ $('Get Current Context').item.json.batchWeek }}. Current month: {{ $('Get Current Context').item.json.month }}. Season: {{ $('Get Current Context').item.json.season }}.

Create one post for each day following this pillar calendar:
1. Monday — Tips: Lawn care tip or quick how-to
2. Tuesday — Before/After: Transformation showcase (describe vividly)
3. Wednesday — Review Spotlight: Write a placeholder review highlight post (will be replaced by real review if available)
4. Thursday — Seasonal: Timely seasonal content for Madison WI
5. Friday — Community: Madison WI community involvement
6. Saturday — Education: Deep-dive lawn science
7. Sunday — Promo: Service promotion with natural CTA

Return ONLY a JSON array of 7 objects with these exact fields:
- post_text (string)
- pillar (string: tips|before_after|review_spotlight|seasonal|community|education|promo)
- post_type (string: tip|showcase|review|seasonal|community|education|promo)
- day_of_week (number: 1=Mon, 2=Tue, 3=Wed, 4=Thu, 5=Fri, 6=Sat, 0=Sun)
- platforms (array: always ["instagram", "google_business_profile"])

Return raw JSON only, no markdown fences."
    }
  ]
}
